description: Fragment from the bottom of a legal document, likely a draft. Dated: first decade of Ḥeshvan 1548 Seleucid = October 1236 CE. (Also possible is 1545 Seleucid = 1233 CE.) Mentioning the pesiqa and not interfering with someone else. Reused on recto for a talmudic citation.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
